{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":158},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7304959894942450495","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的巨好看 从盗墓那本看来的 每一次看完一本书我都会有一种孤独感 落寞感 但又很开心 因为他们终于有了好结局 但是我再也看不到他们的故事了 真的很喜欢九九和乐川的故事 希望他们会在另一个世界一直一直幸福下去吧 会永远幸福的 对于我来说 每一次看一本小说 他们都是有血有肉的 不是纸片人 从来都不是 他们会永远幸福下去 我也会好好的过好我的生活的 再见啦各位 下次大大再出新书我还来喔[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700819950,"group_id":"7250103989499333644","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你能否像红绿灯一样准时出现？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1DzbiRyydfup8fhr8e5NSM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/013dc42ac7584de5b277451f418b221e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618828&x-signature=ZA75A9%2FMKUDOTQ3IZTbwazKJXB0%3D","user_id":"100153197863","user_name":"发烧药"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100153197863","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250103989499333644","book_info":{"abstract":"神棍女帝+无敌国师+双强
【简介：（九川后续篇）】
开局成为女帝。
没政权，没兵权，连帝印也被拿了。
她只能入江湖，不断提升境界，意图有天修道为神。
最后，发现自己真的是神。
她本为天界神明，转世的任务就是为抹杀国师。
国师？
那个坐在自己对面喝茶，长相冠绝天下，桃花眼看着自己爱意能溺出来的少年。
不干，坚决不干。
这任务谁想干谁干。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaf7301316fba239022d2e2f5bba4ebd5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"马由頁","author_id":"","book_id":"7250103989499333644","book_name":"别惹国师，他又在自我攻略","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7251144926451696187","read_count":"251","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"200806"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"95","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e7e9151c7caadab566d2ce2fa8493fb9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253527&x-signature=ptr1XbZFahuekV40XJP9V06yhMg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2902303488084461","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.061515e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10615,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1561},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1700822271,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7267811619165061945","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从作者大大的上一本书穿过来的😍[爱心][爱心]

【简介：（九川后续篇）】
开局成为女帝。
没政权，没兵权，连帝印也被拿了。
她只能入江湖，不断提升境界，意图有天修道为神。
最后，发现自己真的是神。
她本为天界神明，转世的任务就是为抹杀国师。
国师？
那个坐在自己对面喝茶，长相冠绝天下，桃花眼看着自己爱意能溺出来的少年。
不干，坚决不干。
这任务谁想干谁干。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oaf7301316fba239022d2e2f5bba4ebd5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"马由頁","author_id":"","book_id":"7250103989499333644","book_name":"别惹国师，他又在自我攻略","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7251144926451696187","read_count":"251","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"200806"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"95","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e7e9151c7caadab566d2ce2fa8493fb9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253527&x-signature=ptr1XbZFahuekV40XJP9V06yhMg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2902303488084461","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.112438e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读51分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1950,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3062,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1578},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1690863317,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7264008153552601893","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常的好看，内容精彩，期待九九和乐川的爱情故事[舔屏][舔屏][舔屏]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691283789,"group_id":"7250103989499 其次这是一本很好看的书。
最后这是一本很好看的书。
哈哈，其实很开心看到小川和九九能有这样的结局，似乎已经是最好了，故事里的每一个重要角色都有了自己的结局，挖的坑了都填上了。明明是很圆满很美好的事，但心中总是觉得有些怅然若失，可能是不甘心只能陪伴他们到这里吧，总是想着长一些在长一些就好了……
真的很喜欢里面的各种人物，喜欢小川的奋不顾身，喜欢九九的义无反顾，喜欢木姐姐的鲜衣怒马，喜欢江为非的一路陪伴……是说不尽道不完的喜欢，是每一个角色的鲜明个性和独特故事。这个故事里的每一个人似乎都有成为主角的能力，因为他们本就是自己人生的主角。
其实关于这本书在我个人看来更像是对上一本书的补充，这本书给了上一本书中不属于三叔盗笔系统中的人物一个完整的人生，一段完整的经历。对于想要看这本书的我个人建议先看完上一本会体验感更加，不然你不会懂川川和九九的感情从何而来，不会懂他们为什么愿意为了对方不顾一切……
我是一个唯心主义，相信即存在，我相信他们会在另一个世界永远按照自己的心意幸福的活着。
可恶，还是很不甘心跟你说再见啊，但是这次是真的要说再见了，再见了我的川川，再见了最好的小九。最后让我在对你们说一句话：
“新婚快乐，还有要永远幸福啊。”"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700752515,"group_id":"7250103989499333644","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿豆娘平安喜乐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0XsV1ntKICD1FMUfZkcEl3Kf5MX3Vai228nXnWvEGnC","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a5a022458c1f42799ef7ccdb9566fcc6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616106&x-signature=2IIJ7%2BeX024aXz4hjKXgqB7hQyQ%3D","user_id":"2937537225038951","user_name":"容松子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2937537225038951","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741103207,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7250103989499333644","book_info":{"abstract":"神棍女帝+无敌国师+双强

【简介：（九川后续篇）】
开局成为女帝。
没政权，没兵权，连帝印也被拿了。
她只能入江湖，不断提升境界，意图有天修道为神。
最后，发现自己真的是神。
她本为天界神明，转世的任务就是为抹杀国师。
国师？
那个坐在自己对面喝茶，长相冠绝天下，桃花眼看着自己爱意能溺出来的少年。
不干，坚决不干。
